goalDescription: Keeps dna.humaan.app online, maintains the marketplace catalog, funds security updates, and supports community issue triage.
oneTimeDisclaimer: One-time partnership tiers are commercial collaborations — not equity or securities. DNA remains MIT. Partnership terms (custom repo access, duration) begin on payment confirmation.

tiers.name: Supporter
tiers.summary: Help keep DNA free and maintained.
benefits: Public sponsor ledger (website + repository + npm credits)
GitHub Sponsor badge on your profile

tiers.name: Developer
tiers.summary: For engineers who run DNA regularly.
benefits: Everything in Supporter
Linked name in README sponsor ledger
Sponsor-only release updates

tiers.name: Team
tiers.summary: For engineering teams standardising on DNA.
benefits: Everything in Developer
Team or company name + link in README
Priority issue triage for your stack
Quarterly sponsor roadmap update

tiers.name: Company
tiers.summary: For organisations depending on DNA in production.
benefits: Everything in Team
Logo on dna.humaan.app (monthly homepage rotation when provided)
Featured placement in README sponsor ledger
Direct line for security disclosures
Input on marketplace pack priorities
Quarterly check-in with maintainers

oneTimeTiers.name: Backer partner
oneTimeTiers.summary: Shape DNA's future with recognition, feature access, and a private collaboration repo.
benefits: Public sponsor ledger + partner recognition on dna.humaan.app and the repository
Access to all upcoming features during your 6-month partnership
Contribute and shape features on the roadmap
Private custom collaboration repository
Standard priority on feature requests

oneTimeTiers.name: Contributor partner
oneTimeTiers.summary: Same as Backer partner with higher priority and 8 months of involvement.
benefits: Everything in Backer partner
8-month partnership (vs 6 months)
Elevated priority on feature shaping and roadmap input

oneTimeTiers.name: Feature partner
oneTimeTiers.summary: Full recognition, all upcoming features, and high-priority feature shaping for 10 months.
benefits: Public sponsor ledger + featured partner recognition
Access to all upcoming features during your 10-month partnership
Contribute and shape features on the roadmap
Private custom collaboration repository
High priority on feature requests and roadmap input

oneTimeTiers.name: Build partner
oneTimeTiers.summary: Work directly with maintainers to build DNA — named partner with shared recognition.
benefits: Everything in Feature partner
Work directly with maintainers on building DNA
Named partner — shared recognition for making DNA happen
Maximum priority — your ideas prioritised and implemented
10-month partnership with private custom collaboration repository
